titleStmt.title: SII 38.428: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 428. (A.R. No. 428 of 1912.) VAḺUVŪR, MAYAVARAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, maṇḍapa, gōpura, Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājakēsarivarman alias Tribhuvanachchakravarttigaḷ Rājādhirāja II Year 12: Siṁha, ba. 8, Thursday Urōsāṇi = 18th August 1177 A.D.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti of the ruler, kaḍal-sūḻnda, etc;

This inscriptions registers a gift of 200 kāśu deposited in the treasury (of the temple) by Tīyaṅguḍaiyān Karuṇākaraṉ Seṅgadirchchelvaṉ of Tīyaṅguḍi in Tiruvārūrkūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu for burning a perpetual lamp for the god Tiruvīraṭṭāṉam-uḍaiyār at Vaḻugūr, a brahmadēyam in Tiruveḻundūr-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. A piece of land, half-a-mā in extent which was equivalent to 75 kuḻi of land, at Kīraṅguḍi, a hamlet of Vīrarājēndra-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Tiruveḻundūr-nāḍu, was purchased from Kaitturuppaṭṭīśuram-uḍaiyāṉ Bhaṭṭaṉ and Yagña Vishṇu Bhaṭṭaṉ in auction during the 16th regnal year of Rājarāja (II) (1162 A.D.,) and which had been under the possession of the temple authorities since then, was now allotted, after the receipt of the two hundred kāśu from the above donor. It is also stated that the temple authorities agreed to burn the lamp out of the produce of the land after remitting the taxes (ūr māvindavari).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kaṭalcūḻnta pār mātarum mā kalai mātarum Aṭal cūḻnta pormātaruñca
tarumamāntu vāḻa kaṭalcūḻ puviyeḻum pāṟ l pukaḻparappa Āti Ukamāṉeṉṉac coti
ntaruḷi Aṟucamaiyamumaiy pūtamum ṉeṟi teṉṉavaruñ ceralaruñ ciṅkaḷuru
varkaḷ tiṟai cumantu vantu laḻu pārum cempon [ virasiṁhāsa]
ttu Ulakuṭaimukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷuṭaṉ viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripaṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājā
dhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2vatu siṁhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Aṭṭamiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
Urocaṇi ṉāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruveḻuntūr nāṭṭu piramateyam vaḻukūr U
ṭaiyār tiruvīraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyāṟku keyamāṇikka vaḷaṉāṭṭu tiruvārur kūṟṟattu tiyaṅkuṭiyil
tiyaṅkuṭaiyān karuṇākaraṉ ceṅkatirccelvaṉ Iṉṉāḷmutal vaitta tirunontāviḷakku
Onṟukku nilam koḷḷa cipaṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu 2 100 Ikkācu Irunūṟum Oṭukkuk koṇṭu viṭṭa nilam
jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruveḻuntūrnāṭṭu Akaram piramateyam śrī virarājentiraccaruppetimaṅkalat
tu piṭākai kiraṅkuṭiyil cuttamalivatikku meṟku tiruvaraṅka vāykkālukku teṟku Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇ
ṭāñ catirattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam munṟu māvil kiḻakkaṭaiya Ivvūr nampūr kāṭṭukkait tiruppaṭṭi
curamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉuḷiṭṭārum vaṅkippuṟattu yavijñaṣṇapaṭṭaṉum pakkal rācarācatevaṟku 10 6vatu nā
ṉilRead nāḷilcaṇṭecurapperuvilai koṇṭu Anupavittu varukiṟa nilam 5 100 10 kuḻikoṇṭatoru māvāka vanta
» ca mā Iṉṉilamaraimāvu murmāvintavari yiṟuttu mikutikoṇṭu Ittirununtāviḷakkonṟu mikkoyiṟ cimāke
curakkaṅkāṇiceyvārkaḷuṉRead ceyvārkaḷuḷtevakaṉmikaḷum cantirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavatāka sammatittu Ikkācu Irunūṟuṅkai
kkoṇṭu kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom tīyaṅkuṭaiyāṉ karuṇākaraṉ ceṅkatircelvaṉukku Ivvaṉaivom Ip
paṭikkum cimākecurakkaṅkāṇi connāvāraṟivānāṉa cimāttūḷi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai devakanmi māṭilan
kumarannamutanāṉanānūṟṟuvapaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai Aḻakuṭaiyāneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.428 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
